BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Style tag formulas using URL parameters are reachable via web requests.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Injection is straightforward if output is unencoded.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: No auth required in many cases (depends on page access).

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: User must load the affected page.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Limited direct exposure; may support broader XSS chains.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Common XSS patterns and payloads work reliably.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Encoding functions (e.g., JSENCODE) are available and recommended.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Rule identifies unencoded formulas in style contexts.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerable Visualforce or web page is accessed remotely over HTTP(S), allowing attackers to exploit the issue without local access.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Environmental factors do not introduce additional complexity beyond supplying unencoded input.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Attackers do not require authentication or elevated privileges if the affected page is accessible.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: A user must load the affected page for injected style content to be interpreted by the browser.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The impact remains confined to the same application and browser execution context.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Unencoded style injection may expose limited UI or contextual information but does not directly leak sensitive backend data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Injected styles can alter the appearance or minor behavior of the UI but do not directly modify application data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability does not impact application uptime or service availability.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: While highly sensitive data is not typically exposed, maintaining confidentiality of UI-displayed information remains important.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Preserving the integrity of UI presentation and user trust is important for correct application behavior.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not a primary concern for this class of client-side injection issue.
